flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rogue Community College fell 18% between 2006 and 2009 (14.3% → 11.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rogue Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rogue Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 3.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Rogue Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (48.4% → 53.4%).
